arcs.title: The Hollow Crown Expedition
arcs.summary: Christine and Steve reached the granite shelf, met the Duck Bandit, drank tea, then found an unmapped stone arch framing a three-gorge panorama that left Steve speechless and Christine standing still in it for a long moment. A tenth duck appeared on the bonnet. The Jeep is satisfied. Tomorrow: what lies deeper in the hollow below, and whether the unlisted arch holds any further secrets.
